title: VLAND Rear Lights for Golf 7 MK7 Golf 7.5 MK7.5 2013-2019 Tail Lights Assembly with Sequential Turn Signal, E-mark, One Pair (Red)
features: 🚗【DIRECT FITMENT】VLAND LED Tail Lights Suitable for Golf 7 MK7 MK7.5 2013-2020 TDI TSI Tail Lamp (Not fit for Golf 7.5 GTI / Golf R Models).

🚗【5 LIGHTING MODES】Running light: LED (red); Turn Light: LED (Yellow) with Sequential indicator; Brake light: LED (red); Reverse light: LED (white) ; Fog light: LED (red); Note: Full LED. The LED tail light with dynamic sequential flashing which is more brightness and give a good safety warning performance.
🚗【SPECIAL DESIGN】Dynamic sequential turn signal design, when you use the turn signal, the lighting will flow from left to right ,there are more brightness and give a good safety warning performance.

🚗【SUPERIOR QUALITY】The taillights are made of ABS/PMMA/PC, durable and waterproof.LED light significantly increase the intensity and range of lighting, reducing the risk of bad weather.1 year warranty and product with E-mark.

🚗【PACKAGE INCLUDED】One pair of tail lights(included driver side & passenger side) (no bulbs needed); 1 user manual. Plug and play. Usually takes 1-2 hours to install. Professional installation is highly recommended.
description: Product Description VLAND TAILLIGHTS FOR GOLF7 MK7 MK7.5 2013-2020 Note As these are imported products, dirt, injury and damage to the box may occur during transportation, but this does not affect the functions. Plug-N-Play Operation, Direct Bolt-On OE Fitment or Replacement for the Stock Unit. Applicable Models This Rear Tail Lights for Golf 7 mk7 mk7.5 2013 -2020； This Rear Lights for Golf 7 mk7 mk7.5 2013 -2020 Non-Adapted Versions : Sportsvan/7.5GTI/halogen lamp models. What’s in the Package? 1.One Pair of GOLF 7 LED Tail lights(Left and Right Side) 2.User Maunal 3.Wire Harness*2 RUNNING LIGHTS · All the lighting is LED! Full LED taillight! · Small: a total of about two LED rocket U - shaped optical fibers. Give off even light. High quality light guide plate is small in size, high in brightness, beautiful in design and long in service life. TURN SIGNALS Cool turn signals will not be limited to luxury cars. We will improve the quality of the entire vehicle. The beautiful yellow stripe pattern is reproduced, and the enviable streamer turn signal function is added. BRAKE LIGHTS High brightness LED bulb, greatly improved brightness, uniform color range, less power consumption.In addition to LED bulbs, it also supports small lights, more obvious steering warnings, and ensures your safety. RESERVE&FOG LIGHTS Reversing lights: Relying on the reversing lights to illuminate the rear line of sight at night, warning the rear vehicle or pedestrian. Fog light:More penetrating;High degree of identification;Improve the visibility of drivers and surrounding traffic participants,Make the car and pedestrian find each other at a distance. Light on Gorgeous upgrade, cool and stylish. In rainy days, avoid the danger of bad weather such as dense fog and bad vision. The built-in high brightness LED realizes strong illumination. Light up the night road,prevent rear-end. After Installation of VLAND Golf Mk7 Rear Lights LED Taillights Equipped with daytime running light and dynamic turn signal function; The brightness is greatly improved, be more beautiful and safer than pure; Driving at night attracts people's attention. Better lighting effect, wider range, safer driving. Material ABS/PMMA/PC ABS resin has excellent durability and surface beauty. Professional housing design with heat sink at the back of the lamp ensures LED not over heated and have longer life span. With reverse polarity protection and open circuit protection, 100% waterproof and shock resistant. ABOUT VLAND VLAND is the manufacturer specializing in the development and production of modified car lamps. Focused on product improvement and superiority. We develop aftermarket car headlights and taillights to entertain people in the world of modification.
